targets.query:
from(bucket: "docker")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "docker_container_cpu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["container_name"] =~ /cooja.*/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "usage_percent")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "docker")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "docker_container_mem")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["container_name"] =~ /cooja.*/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "usage_percent")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "docker")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "docker_container_net")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["container_name"] =~ /cooja.*/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "rx_bytes" or r["_field"] == "tx_bytes")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum)
  |> yield(name: "sum")

from(bucket: "docker")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "docker_container_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["container_name"] =~ /cooja.*/)
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["container_name", "_value", "_time"])
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "docker")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "docker_container_cpu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["container_name"] =~ /cooja.*/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "usage_percent")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "mean")
